data.name: The link to the brand's home page.
data.value: The link to the brand's home page.

data.name: Allow anyone to call the API without a Bearer token or authentication.
data.value: Allow anyone to call the API without a Bearer token or authentication.

data.name: Allow users to adjust their nickname in the profile management page.
data.value: Allow users to adjust their nickname in the profile management page.

data.name: The brand name displayed in the footer.
data.value: The brand name displayed in the footer.

data.name: The default virtual model to use for chat requests when no model is specified.
data.value: The default virtual model to use for chat requests when no model is specified.

data.name: The default virtual model to use for embedding requests when no model is specified.
data.value: The default virtual model to use for embedding requests when no model is specified.

data.name: The ICP license number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.
data.value: The ICP license number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.

data.name: The interval in minutes to ping the loaded models to keep them in memory.
data.value: The interval in minutes to ping the loaded models to keep them in memory.

data.name: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.
data.value: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.

data.name: The maximum time in minutes to wait for a response from the underlying Ollama server.
data.value: The maximum time in minutes to wait for a response from the underlying Ollama server.

data.name: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.
data.value: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.
